name: keel
description: Complete AI-SDLC pipeline for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. 8 autonomous agents take you from idea to production in 2-4 hours: Brainstorm → Requirements → Design → TDD → QA → Security → Deploy.

marketplace.longDescription: Keel automates your entire software development lifecycle with 8 specialised AI agents. From brainstorming to canary deployment — all inside Claude Code or Claude Desktop. v3.0 supports CakePHP 4.4 / PHP 8.1 (production-proven). Laravel, Django, and Rails are on the v3.1 roadmap. Optional integrations with Jira, GitHub, Slack, and Playwright.
marketplace.installCommand: claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/creativemyntra/keel && claude plugin install keel

commands.name: keel
commands.description: Root Keel command — run /keel --help for all subcommands

commands.name: keel:init
commands.description: Scaffold a new project or add Keel to an existing one

commands.name: keel:brainstorm
commands.description: Generate feature ideas from a business goal

commands.name: keel:req
commands.description: Create BDD requirements, acceptance criteria, and API spec

commands.name: keel:design
commands.description: Generate system architecture, DB schema, and API contracts

commands.name: keel:tdd-green
commands.description: Write implementation to pass tests (TDD Green phase)

commands.name: keel:tdd-refactor
commands.description: Refactor code while keeping tests green

commands.name: keel:test
commands.description: Run comprehensive test suite with coverage reporting

commands.name: keel:deploy
commands.description: Deploy with canary, blue-green, or instant rollout

skills.name: keel:sprint-planning
skills.description: Generate sprint plans from backlog and team capacity

skills.name: keel:create-prd
skills.description: Generate a PRD from a raw feature request

skills.name: keel:analyze-story
skills.description: Elaborate a backlog story through a Business Analyst lens

skills.name: keel:investigate-defect
skills.description: Structured defect investigation with RCA output

skills.name: keel:create-mom
skills.description: Generate Minutes of Meeting from notes or transcript

skills.name: keel:generate-tests
skills.description: Generate five required test categories for a feature

skills.name: keel:e2e-test
skills.description: Generate or run Playwright E2E tests for a user flow

skills.name: keel:review-code
skills.description: QA and Security review on staged changes

skills.name: keel:implement-feature
skills.description: Run the full pipeline from approved design to tested implementation

agents.name: keel:orchestrator
agents.description: Routes all AI-SDLC work, enforces phase gates

agents.name: keel:business-analyst
agents.description: Functional specs, data flows, edge cases

optionalIntegrations.name: jira
optionalIntegrations.description: Sync story details and update issue status automatically

optionalIntegrations.name: github
optionalIntegrations.description: Push code, create PRs, and link to GitHub issues

optionalIntegrations.name: slack
optionalIntegrations.description: Notify team on phase completion and deployment status
